items.title: 'So close on the line!' - Teenager Lutkenhaus stuns Olympic champion in 800m
items.summary: Watch 17-year-old American Cooper Lutkenhaus stun Olympic champion Emmanuel Wanyonyi in the men's 800m at the Diamond League meeting in Norway.
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.
